name: hypervibe-harness
description: Open-source distribution of the Hypervibe plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: hypervibe
plugins.description: Bootstrap a full-stack T3 project (Next.js + tRPC + Drizzle + Tailwind + shadcn/ui) with modular addons for database, auth, payments, email, storage, i18n, analytics, domain, and SEO. Deploys to Vercel with GitHub integration.
